name: Feather Sources
subtitle: Unofficial Feather sources for sideloading apps.

apps.name: Plezy
apps.subtitle: Modern cross-platform Plex client
apps.localizedDescription: A modern Plex client built with Flutter for native performance and a clean interface. Stream your media library with a beautiful, responsive UI.

versions.localizedDescription:
## Fixed
- Continuous play queue for aired date episode order
- Live TV stream EOF and reconnect handling
- Library grid stuck skeletons on fast scroll
- Missing season tabs for single-season shows

## Improved
- Run SQLite on background isolate
- Library grid scroll and idle frame rendering

## Fixed
- Continuous play queue for aired date episode order
- Skip SAF picker on Android TV
- Live TV stream EOF and reconnect handling

## Improved
- Run SQLite on background isolate
- Library grid scroll and idle frame rendering
